message: Cached convention adapter property getters, added a convention input writer fast path to avoid redundant event-value arrays during kernel input assembly, and added convention adapter benchmark coverage.

Verified convention adapter optimization: ConventionEventAdapter caches compiled property getters and implements IPluginEventValueWriter so PluginKernelInputBuilder can write convention event values directly into the final input buffer, avoiding the redundant event-value array when live settings are present. Public ShouldHandleAsync/HandleAsync still call ValidateFor before input construction, HookPipeline.UseKernel still validates before InvokeAsync, and explicit interface adapters still register through IPluginEventAdapter EventName/Parameters without concrete-type reflection. Benchmark coverage exists at benchmarks/SafeIR.Benchmarks/Plugins/ConventionEventAdapterBenchmarks.cs with MemoryDiagnoser and 1/5/20 property convention events. Validation passed: dotnet test tests/SafeIR.Tests/SafeIR.Tests.csproj --filter FullyQualifiedName~PluginHookSignatureTests|FullyQualifiedName~PluginInputAllocationTests passed 8/8; dotnet build benchmarks/SafeIR.Benchmarks/SafeIR.Benchmarks.csproj passed with 0 warnings and 0 errors; ./scripts/agentq.ps1 doctor reported doctor ok.
